channel.title: The Grant Desk - Research & Journalism, US, next 90 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Research & Journalism, US, next 90 days.

item.title: SSRC Just Tech Fellowship 2027 - Up to $60,000 unrestricted - deadline 28 Jun 2026
item.description:
Social Science Research Council (SSRC)

Location: United States (must reside in US during fellowship year)

Award: Up to $60,000 unrestricted

Duration: 1 year

Deadline: 28 Jun 2026

SSRC's flagship public-interest tech fellowship for individuals working on a more just, equitable and representative technological future. Open to researchers, practitioners, organisers, artists and technologists; no degree requirement; must reside in the US during the fellowship year. Includes mentoring and an in-person workshop. Strong fit for critical data, algorithmic justice, platform governance and digital rights work.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
